biography: Homer Efstratiadis (Piraeus, May 3, 1938) is a Greek film and television director. He is particularly known for the film series Roda bag and kopana, No2 and No3 and for his erotic films in the 1970s. On television, he directed several well-known Annita Pania shows such as Chrysos koufeto, Aypnieis, Je t'aime, etc. He has also directed several series, such as O taxi driver on YENED. He has also directed several video films.
name: Omiros Efstratiadis
